faqs.question: What services does WJB Technologies provide?
faqs.answer: WJB Technologies provides end-to-end software development services including web development, mobile applications, desktop software, custom enterprise solutions, UI/UX design, API development, cloud applications, testing, maintenance, and technology consulting for businesses in India and abroad.

faqs.question: Which industries do you work with?
faqs.answer: We work with organisations across manufacturing, healthcare, education, retail, distribution, professional services, logistics, and technology-led startups. Our solutions are tailored to each industry's operational workflows and compliance needs.

faqs.question: Do you work with startups as well as established enterprises?
faqs.answer: Yes. We support early-stage product builds, growth-stage platform scaling, and enterprise modernisation initiatives. Our engagement models flex to match your team size, timeline, and technical maturity.

faqs.question: Where is WJB Technologies based?
faqs.answer: WJB Technologies is based in India, supporting clients across domestic and international markets through remote collaboration and on-site engagement as needed.

faqs.question: How do you start a new software project?
faqs.answer: Every project begins with a discovery phase where we understand your business goals, users, existing systems, and success criteria. We then propose architecture, milestones, and a delivery plan before development begins.

faqs.question: What development methodology do you follow?
faqs.answer: We typically follow Agile practices with iterative sprints, regular demos, and continuous feedback. For certain enterprise engagements, we adapt to structured phase-gate delivery where documentation and compliance are prioritised.

faqs.question: Can you take over an existing project from another vendor?
faqs.answer: Yes. We perform a technical assessment of the existing codebase, infrastructure, and documentation before proposing a stabilisation or enhancement roadmap. This helps reduce risk during transition.

faqs.question: Do you provide source code and documentation?
faqs.answer: Yes. Upon project completion and as per agreement terms, clients receive source code, deployment documentation, and handover materials required for internal maintenance or future enhancements.

faqs.question: How do you handle project communication?
faqs.answer: We assign a dedicated project coordinator and use agreed channels such as email, video calls, and project management tools. Status updates, sprint reviews, and issue tracking remain transparent throughout delivery.

faqs.question: What technologies do you specialise in?
faqs.answer: Our teams work with modern stacks including React, Next.js, Node.js, .NET, Python, React Native, Flutter, PostgreSQL, MySQL, MongoDB, AWS, Azure, and a wide range of integration and testing tools.

faqs.question: Can you integrate with our existing ERP or CRM?
faqs.answer: Yes. We build secure APIs and middleware to connect new applications with ERP, CRM, payment gateways, logistics platforms, and other third-party systems already used in your organisation.

faqs.question: Do you build cloud-ready applications?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We design applications for cloud deployment with scalability, monitoring, and security in mind. We support AWS, Azure, and hybrid setups depending on your infrastructure preferences.

faqs.question: How do you ensure application security?
faqs.answer: We follow secure coding practices, role-based access control, encrypted data handling, input validation, and regular code reviews. Security considerations are embedded from architecture through deployment.

faqs.question: Do you offer post-launch support?
faqs.answer: Yes. We provide maintenance and support plans covering bug fixes, minor enhancements, performance monitoring, and dependency updates to keep your software reliable after launch.

faqs.question: Can you work as an extended development team?
faqs.answer: We frequently operate as an extended engineering team, collaborating with your in-house staff on product roadmap items, feature delivery, and technical backlog management.

faqs.question: What is your typical project timeline?
faqs.answer: Timelines depend on scope and complexity. Small modules may take a few weeks, while enterprise platforms may span several months. We provide realistic estimates after discovery and requirement analysis.

faqs.question: How do I request a project estimate?
faqs.answer: You can contact us through the website contact form or email us at info@wjbtechnologies.com. Share your requirements and we will schedule a consultation to provide a tailored proposal.
